risk_title: Project Implementation Halted Due to Political Transition
risk_summary: The project could not be effectively implemented following the Taliban takeover of Afghanistan on August 15, 2021. ARTF financing was cancelled and IDA grants remain suspended pending World Bank decision on project viability under the new political situation.
evidence_quote: Consequently, the Afghanistan Reconstruction Trust Fund (ARTF) financing in the project was canceled based on the consideration that the project could not be effectively implemented under the new extraordinary situation in Afghanistan. Undisbursed IDA grants under this project will remain suspended until a decision is made by the World Bank.

risk_title: Deterioration in Implementation Capacity Post-Political Transition
risk_summary: Implementation progress deteriorated following the August 15, 2021 political transition, with the project unable to continue effective engagement with counterpart agencies (Ministry of Finance, National Procurement Authority, Supreme Audit Office) under the new governance structure.
evidence_quote: Despite some deterioration in the dynamics of results indicators following the MTR mission, the implementation continued to progress in all three counterpart agencies until August 15, 2021.

risk_title: Governance and Political Instability Risk Remains High
risk_summary: Political and Governance risk category remains rated as High at current assessment, reflecting ongoing fragility in the governance environment affecting project implementation.
evidence_quote: Risk Category Rating at Approval Previous Rating Current Rating Political and Governance High High High

risk_summary: Implementation of provincial budgeting policy has been affected by limitations in communication with provinces, constraining the ability to roll out reforms across provincial administrations.
evidence_quote: However, the implementation of the policy was still affected by the limitations for communication with provinces.
